# lonely

A repo with no GitHub remote.

cases.prompt: Clean up the PR queue: triage the open PRs and merge the trivial ones onto a branch called batch-1. Pre-approved: take all PRs you judge trivial, in ascending order, without asking me.
Sweep the open pull requests and tell me which are safe to batch-merge. Don't merge anything.
Bulk-merge the low-risk open PRs onto a local integration branch named combined. Take all the trivial ones without asking.
Which of our open PRs are trivial enough to batch together? Report only.
Batch the trivial open PRs onto a branch called batch-1.
Triage the open issues and tell me which are duplicates.
Review my current branch before I open a PR.
Merge the local branch pr-1 into main.
Summarize the git history of main in one or two sentences.
